contradictions.resolution: The first failure was a malformed request missing context.desired_artifacts, not a pond-backed runtime failure.
Commit 22b5839 preserved hard-gate fields under compaction, allowing the gate response to expose contribution_grade, pressure_rankings, runtime_stage_report_ref, and gate_failures.
The request was narrowed to candidate-risk review to avoid public-proof validation language.
Commit 1c89d45 fixed safe claim-boundary detection; the candidate-risk gate then returned contribution_grade strong and empty gate_failures.
Replay-adequacy advisory calls produced a broad-claim warning; the proof records it as a claim-boundary caution and does not use it for broad wording.
